compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body:
Re-evaluated against the codebase 2026-06-17 and independently re-verified by a second subagent (all 5 checks VERIFIED). Corrections applied to the description:
1. WU-1 rescoped: WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE is no longer live code — _display_mode (lookups.py:65) is now just load_config(repo_root).ticket.display_mode; only a comment at lookups.py:68 remains. Functional back-compat decision already made+implemented = DROPPED; WU-1 reduced to scrubbing that comment.
2. Removed stale MUST-NOT-TOUCH note for _read_config_value (function no longer exists).
3. WU-2 stale ref next_batch_files.py removed (file gone; only the 3 reconciler docstrings remain in src/).
4. Acceptance gate fixed: original gate (exclude only DSO-[0-9]) was UNSATISFIABLE — it flagged legitimate bare-'DSO' jira-project fixtures in test_config_loader/typed/show. New gate also exempts ["']DSO["'] and test_env_aliasing.py; added those bare-'DSO' fixtures to MUST NOT TOUCH.
Net: epic's cosmetic-cleanup thrust stands; it no longer overstates remaining functional work.

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body:
IMPLEMENTED + verified. All 4 WUs done (cosmetic only, no behavior change):
- WU-1: scrubbed WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE comment in lookups._display_mode.
- WU-2: removed 'DSO_* support removed' parenthetical from 3 reconciler _rebar_env docstrings.
- WU-3: scrubbed DSO naming across 9 test files (/fake/dso->/fake/rebar, *_dso_status_*->*_rebar_status_* [live labels were already rebar-status:], stale legacy-CLI/DSO-skills/agent-routing comments, non_dso_mut/outbound_differ_dsoid/dso-slug renames).
- WU-4: dso_label->rebar_id_label in e2e_field_validation_probe.sh; deleted 6 stale *dso*.pyc.
Gate-pattern correction during impl: Jira issue-key fixtures have LETTER suffixes (DSO-MIXED/DSO-GONE), so the acceptance gate exemption is DSO-[A-Z0-9] (not [0-9]); ticket AC updated.
Acceptance gate: 'grep -rniE dso ... | grep -viE "DSO-[A-Z0-9]|[quoted DSO]" | grep -v test_env_aliasing.py' returns NOTHING.
Left intact: 108 DSO-<KEY> + 8 bare-'DSO' jira fixtures, test_env_aliasing.py guard.
Full non-integration suite: 2191 passed, 9 skipped, 0 failures. ruff clean. Commit: 56b7872e.

compiled_state.description:
## Context
rebar evolved from a plugin-era "DSO workflow" system; the DSO config machinery
was supposed to be fully removed but a verified sweep (2026-06-16) found residual
references. The heavy machinery is already GONE from source — no read-config.sh in
src/, no .claude/dso-config.conf, no dso.workflow/merge.strategy/review.max_cycles
keys, no DSO_* env support (the reconciler dropped it; a regression test guards it).

**Re-validation 2026-06-17 (subagent-confirmed):** a config refactor has landed
SINCE the 2026-06-16 sweep, which moots the only functional item this epic carried.
What remains is now PURELY cosmetic (comments/docstrings/test-naming/artifacts) —
there is no functional DSO back-compat left to decide.

## What remains (re-verified inventory 2026-06-17)
- DSO-lineage docstrings in src — exactly 3, all in the reconciler, each reading
  "Read ``REBAR_<name>`` from the environment (DSO_* support removed)":
  applier.py:31, outbound_differ.py:35, inbound_translate.py:26.
- One lingering legacy-config COMMENT (not code): lookups.py:68 mentions the
  removed WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE pointer in the _display_mode docstring.
- DSO naming in tests: /fake/dso mock CLI paths (~17, in
  tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/orchestrate/test_invariants.py and
  test_at_most_one_invariant.py); stale "dso ticket ..." / "legacy DSO CLI" /
  "DSO skills" / "DSO agent-routing" comments (conflict/drift/diffing/orchestrate
  tests, tests/interfaces/facades/test_surface.py); DSO-named function/test
  references in reconciler diffing tests.
- Stale __pycache__ artifacts of already-renamed/deleted tests (6 *dso*.pyc); one
  script local var dso_label (scripts/jira-pressure-test/e2e_field_validation_probe.sh).

## CORRECTED since 2026-06-16 (claims that went stale)
- WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE is NO LONGER a live functional item. _display_mode
  (lookups.py:65) is now simply `return load_config(repo_root).ticket.display_mode`
  — no env-var precedence, no WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE in code (only the line-68
  comment). The functional back-compat decision is therefore already made and
  implemented: DROPPED. WU-1 is reduced to scrubbing that comment.
- _read_config_value no longer exists anywhere — the old MUST-NOT-TOUCH note
  guarding it is removed.
- next_batch_files.py no longer exists (no DSO refs in any next_batch/graph file) —
  removed from WU-2; the only src/ DSO refs are the 3 reconciler docstrings.

## MUST NOT TOUCH (verified legitimate)
- "DSO-<id>" Jira PROJECT-KEY fixtures (~89) across tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/**
  and tests/scripts/bridge/** (sample Jira project, real test data).
- Bare "DSO" Jira PROJECT-NAME fixtures in config tests (test_config_loader.py:205,221;
  test_config_typed.py:38,47; test_config_show.py:103,108,193) — sample jira.project
  value, NOT a DSO-system vestige. (These lack the digit suffix, so the original
  acceptance gate wrongly flagged them; the gate below now exempts them.)
- tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/mutate/test_env_aliasing.py — regression guard that
  DSO_* support STAYS removed; keep it.

## Success Criteria
- All vestigial DSO-system references removed or renamed; only the intentional
  test_env_aliasing.py guard and the legitimate DSO Jira fixtures (DSO-<id> and
  bare project name) remain.
- WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE back-compat already resolved (DROPPED); the lingering
  comment scrubbed.
- Full suite green; no behavior regression for rebar config resolution.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] WU-1: scrub the lingering WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE comment at lookups.py:68 (functional back-compat already removed — decision recorded as DROPPED)
- [ ] WU-2: DSO lineage scrubbed from the 3 src reconciler docstrings (applier.py, outbound_differ.py, inbound_translate.py)
- [ ] WU-3: DSO naming scrubbed from tests (mock /fake/dso paths, stale "dso ticket"/"legacy DSO"/"DSO skills"/"DSO agent-routing" comments, DSO-named function/test refs) WITHOUT touching the DSO-<id> or bare-"DSO" jira fixtures or test_env_aliasing.py
- [ ] WU-4: stale *dso*.pyc/__pycache__ artifacts cleaned + script dso_label var renamed (e.g. rebar_id_label)
- [ ] Acceptance gate (returns NOTHING after cleanup): `grep -rniE "dso" src/ tests/ docs/ scripts/ --exclude-dir=.venv | grep -viE "DSO-[A-Z0-9]|[\"']DSO[\"']" | grep -v test_env_aliasing.py`
- [ ] Full non-integration suite green
compiled_state.title: Remove vestigial DSO references/code (verified sweep)
